ops.text: ccx vcs ship from a jj secondary workspace (jj workspace add ../foo) commits and pushes fine but its CI-watch stage dies: gh run list runs in the workspace cwd, which has no colocated .git (only the default workspace does), so gh fails "not a git repository" and ship exits 1 despite a successful push — reads as a failed ship. Hit 2026-07-19 shipping experiment-at-home 90362b5 from ../experiment-at-home-w4. Workaround: re-run the watch from the default checkout (gh run list --commit <sha>). Fix idea: ship should resolve the git dir via `jj git root` (or the workspace's repo path) for gh, or fall back to -R <owner/repo> derived from the remote URL.
